title: potato Optimized
description: a Optimized modpack for potato pcs
body:
potato Optimized is a lightweight Fabric-based modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 and more focused entirely on improving performance and increasing FPS. It uses a curated selection of client-side optimization mods that reduce lag, smooth out frame drops, and make the game run more efficiently.
 
 Designed to keep the vanilla gameplay experience untouched, potato Optimized is perfect for players on low-end hardware or anyone who just wants a smoother Minecraft experience.

 No extra content. No gameplay changes. Just better performance.
  
 includes shaders.
